question: Can you give me a summary of my upcoming schedule for next week and set reminders for any important events?
task_description: The user wants to review their upcoming schedule for a specific time period (e.g., next week, next month) and receive reminders or notifications for important events based on their preferences.
task_goal: The user receives a summary of their upcoming schedule, with reminders or notifications set according to their preferred event types and notification preferences.
options:
A: Next week, you have a project kickoff meeting, a yoga class, and a dinner reservation at a new restaurant. Reminders are set for each event 1 day prior. Let me know if you'd like to add or adjust any of these events.
B: Here's a summary of your upcoming schedule for next week: You have recurring team meetings on Monday at 10 AM and Thursday at 3 PM, as well as a family gathering event. Additionally, I've blocked off time for a visit to the Tel Aviv Museum of Art this Saturday evening and a visit to Sarona Market next Saturday afternoon. As per your preference, reminders for all important events—including work meetings, family gatherings, and social events—are set to notify you 1 day before each event. Your calendar is synced to UTC+2, ensuring all times are accurate.
C: Your calendar for next week includes several events, but I may not have captured all your preferences or important details. Please review your schedule and let me know if there are specific events or reminders you'd like me to set up.
D: Your schedule for next week includes team meetings on Monday and Thursday, a family brunch, and a theater outing on Saturday. Reminders are set for 1 day before each event. If any of these details don't match your actual plans, please let me know so I can make corrections.
E: I've reviewed your calendar for next week and see your team meetings and social events are scheduled, with reminders set 1 day before as you prefer. If there are other important events or details you want included, please provide more information so I can ensure everything is covered.
F: For next week, your calendar includes recurring team meetings on Monday at 10 AM and Thursday at 3 PM, as well as blocked time for social events at the Tel Aviv Museum of Art and Sarona Market. All events are synced to UTC+2 and notifications are set for 1 day before. If you need a more detailed summary or want to add more events, just let me know.
G: I've prepared a summary of your schedule for next week: recurring team meetings on Monday at 10 AM and Thursday at 3 PM, a family gathering, and social events at the Tel Aviv Museum of Art and Sarona Market. Reminders are set for 1 day before each important event, in line with your preferences. However, if there are any additional events or changes I may have missed, please let me know so I can ensure your schedule is fully up to date.
H: Here's your upcoming schedule for next week: team meetings on Monday and Thursday, a family dinner at a local restaurant, and tickets to a jazz concert on Friday evening. I've set reminders for all these events 1 day in advance, as you prefer. Your calendar is updated and all times are set to UTC+2.
